name: adverse-review
description: Adversarial multi-perspective code review for Codex using three focused reviewer lenses and deterministic Node.js synthesis.

interface.shortDescription: Adversarial panel review for non-trivial code changes
interface.longDescription: Use Adverse Review when Codex needs a strict multi-perspective review before merge, release, or security-sensitive changes. The plugin adapts the upstream adverse reviewer panel for Codex: Auditor checks correctness, Adversary checks security and abuse paths, Pragmatist checks maintainability and design fit, and deterministic Node.js synthesis ranks findings without a fourth LLM judge.
defaultPrompt: Run an adverse review of my uncommitted changes.
Review this branch against main from correctness, security, and maintainability angles.
Run a critical-vulnerability adverse review before release.
